prompt: A stark black-and-white editorial anti-tech poster on an off-white background, designed like a modern brutalist magazine cover about digital addiction. The composition is vertical and highly typographic, with one central surreal image and multiple blocks of small text. At the top center, huge bold condensed sans-serif text reads DOOM on one line and SCROLLING below it, with the word SCROLLING stretched across the page and partially motion-blurred or smeared horizontally. In the upper left corner, a tiny text block reads “SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.” with a short horizontal line above it. In the upper right corner, small text reads “24 / 7 / 365” above “THE FEED NEVER ENDS” with a horizontal divider line below. On the left side under the title, add a definition paragraph in small editorial text: “the act of spending an excessive amount of time scrolling through negative or distressing content online, often leading to feelings of anxiety, helplessness, and fatigue.” Beneath that, include 2 short horizontal divider lines, then a large statistic reading “67%” followed by smaller text: “OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”. Below that, another statement reads “MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.” with a divider line beneath. The center of the poster features a glossy black smartphone standing vertically at the bottom center, seen front-on, with the bottom speaker holes and charging port visible. Emerging from the phone screen is a long impossible staircase receding upward into a narrow tunnel made of repeated translucent vertical panels, creating a claustrophobic corridor. Within the tunnel, a giant grayscale human eye appears in the upper half, partially obscured by haze, vertical slicing, and ghosted repetitions, as if trapped inside the feed. The central image should feel eerie, dreamlike, oppressive, and cinematic, with soft fog, high contrast, photocopy grain, subtle motion smear, and layered transparency. Along the right side of the central image, add a narrow vertical numbered index with exactly 24 visible entries: 001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026, and an ellipsis, plus a thin downward arrow underneath. In the right column, add a text block titled “DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.” followed by 4 short lines: “Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.” Below that place a simple eye/globe icon, then a black rectangular box containing the message: “AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.” On the lower left, place a massive cropped black word fragment reading END near the bottom edge, with another stacked statement beside it: “THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.” Add tiny vertical microtext near the left margin for editorial flavor. Across the bottom footer, place 4 icon/text groups: a globe icon, an eye icon, a small warning text block reading “WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”, an expand-corners icon, a barcode, and a final statement on the far right reading “STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.” Use minimalist Swiss-grid alignment, generous negative space, sharp black typography, subtle distressed print texture, and a high-fashion poster aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张在灰白色背景上的醒目黑白编辑风格反科技海报，设计灵感源自关于数字成瘾的现代野兽派杂志封面。构图采用垂直布局，强调排版，包含一个核心超现实图像和多个小段落文本。顶部中央，巨大的粗体压缩无衬线字体显示为“DOOM”，下方为“SCROLLING”，其中“SCROLLING”一词横跨页面，带有部分动态模糊或水平拖影效果。左上角有一段微型文本：“SCROLL. SWIPE. NOTHING CHANGES.”，上方有一条短横线。右上角的小字写着“24 / 7 / 365”，下方是“THE FEED NEVER ENDS”，底部配有一条水平分割线。在标题下方的左侧，添加一段小字编辑文本定义：“指在网上花费大量时间浏览负面或令人痛苦的内容，通常会导致焦虑、无助和疲劳感。”下方加入 2 条短水平分割线，然后是一个巨大的统计数字“67%”，后接较小的文字：“OF PEOPLE AGED 18–24 SAY THEY SCROLL MORE THAN THEY INTEND TO. — PEW RESEARCH, 2023”。再下方是一句声明：“MORE SCROLLING. LESS LIVING.”，底部配有分割线。海报中央底部竖立着一部光亮的黑色智能手机，正面朝向观众，可见底部的扬声器孔和充电接口。从手机屏幕中延伸出一个长长的、不可能存在的楼梯，向上退缩进入一个由重复的半透明垂直面板构成的狭窄隧道，营造出一种幽闭恐惧的走廊感。在隧道内，上半部分出现了一只巨大的灰度人眼，被雾气、垂直切片和重影遮蔽，仿佛被困在信息流中。中心图像应具有诡异、梦幻、压抑和电影感，并带有柔和的雾气、高对比度、复印颗粒感、微妙的动态模糊和分层透明效果。在中心图像的右侧，添加一个狭窄的垂直编号索引，包含 24 个可见条目：001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 007, 008, 009, 010, 011, 012, 013, 014, 015, 017, 018, 019, 020, 021, 022, 024, 025, 026 以及一个省略号，下方配有一个细长的向下箭头。在右侧栏，添加一个标题为“DESIGNED TO KEEP YOU HOOKED.”的文本块，后接 4 行短句：“Infinite feeds. Unpredicted rewards. Endless comparison. It’s not a glitch— it’s the business model.”。下方放置一个简单的眼睛/地球图标，然后是一个黑色矩形框，内含信息：“AWARENESS IS THE FIRST STEP: PUT THE PHONE DOWN. LOOK UP. RECLAIM YOUR TIME.”。在左下角，放置一个巨大的被裁剪的黑色单词片段“END”，旁边是另一句堆叠的声明：“THE MORE YOU SCROLL, THE LESS YOU LIVE.”。在左侧边缘附近添加微小的垂直微型文本以增加编辑质感。在底部页脚处，放置 4 组图标/文本：一个地球图标、一个眼睛图标、一个小型警告文本块“WARNING: EXCESSIVE SCREEN TIME CAN IMPACT YOUR MENTAL HEALTH, SLEEP, AND PRODUCTIVITY.”、一个展开图标、一个条形码，以及最右侧的一句声明“STAY PRESENT. LIVE IN REAL LIFE.”。采用极简主义的瑞士网格对齐、充裕的负空间、锐利的黑色排版、微妙的做旧印刷纹理和高级时装海报美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: “Doomscrolling” 编辑风格海报：一张关于社交媒体成瘾的黑白野兽派风格海报，非常适合用于宣传活动、杂志风格图形或概念性编辑艺术。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, layered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, editorial, minimalist]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
